items.name: prompt-block-editor
items.title: Prompt Block Editor
items.description: Full shadcn prompt-block editor with searchable/filterable data table, selectable columns, and Zod-validated create/edit forms. Requires @mano8/astro-prompt-m8 installed.

items.name: prompt-template-editor
items.title: Prompt Template Editor
items.description: Full shadcn prompt-template editor with searchable/filterable template and block data tables, selectable columns, and Zod-validated create/edit forms. Requires @mano8/astro-prompt-m8 installed.

items.name: prompt-dashboard-overview
items.title: Prompt Admin Dashboard Overview
items.description: Prompt-engine dashboard (stat cards + activity) driven by usePromptAdmin. Requires @mano8/astro-prompt-m8 installed.

items.name: admin-prompt-dashboard
items.title: Admin Prompt Dashboard
items.description: Prompt admin overview dashboard; wraps the package's PromptProvider + RequireSuperuser. Requires @mano8/astro-prompt-m8 (and a fa-auth-m8 token adapter) installed.
